name: Ranch Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Lean beef, trimmed, bite size
recipeInstructions:
1. Place meat in a 1-quart baking dish.
2. Brown in slow oven at 325°F for 45 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Add 1 cup of water to the dish.
4. Cover and bake for 1 hour or until meat is tender.
5. Meanwhile, cook carrots in the remaining 2 cups of water.
6. When partially cooked, add potatoes and cook until all are tender.
7. Add onions and peas to the vegetables.
8. Stir the liquid from the vegetables with flour if desired.
9. Add Worcestershire sauce, salt, and pepper to the liquid.
10. Pour over meat and vegetables.
11. Cover and return to oven for 20 minutes.
